name: Trinity Mathis
ai_summary: Trinity Mathis is a recent high school graduate from Waynesboro, Georgia with hands-on experience as a teacher assistant at Children Unique Christian Daycare in Augusta, where she worked with infants, toddlers, and young children. She demonstrates strong conflict-resolution skills, patience, and a passion for creating safe, engaging learning environments, making her well-suited for a part-time teaching role within a 45-mile radius.
